pi_items.key: Manned field is real EPCRA field

pi_items.verified_value: Manned is a confirmed field in the EPCRA Tier II standard, visible in epcra_tier2_data.xml as '<manned>true</manned>' (line 39)
pi_items.source: epcra_tier2_data.xml facility record shows '<manned>true</manned>' field; National Tier II Data Standard documents this as a standard facility attribute

pi_items.metadata_value: Task references 'LocationOfPlans' or 'Location of Plans' field for storing emergency plan location
pi_items.verified_value: Field not found in public EPCRA Tier II documentation or CAMEO Data Manager documentation
pi_items.source: Web searches for EPCRA Tier II schema, National Tier II Data Standard (https://cameo.noaa.gov/epcra_tier2/data_standard/v1/), EPA Tier II Forms and Instructions, and CAMEO Data Manager documentation did not reveal this field name. May be a custom field in this specific environment implementation.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task uses CAMEO Data Manager to manage facilities
pi_items.verified_value: CAMEO Data Manager is a real EPA/NOAA application for emergency planning and Tier II data management. Installer 'cameodatamanager451installer.exe' (v4.51) exists in /workspace/data
pi_items.source: EPA website https://www.epa.gov/cameo/cameo-data-manager-software and NOAA https://cameo.noaa.gov/; installer file verified in environment data directory

pi_items.source: Standard US postal ZIP codes; 66002 is real but paired with fabricated city name

privileged_info_summary: This task uses synthetic test data. CAMEO Data Manager (v4.51) is the real EPA/NOAA emergency planning application. The facility 'North Creek Lift Station' is fabricated with address '8800 North Creek Rd, Anytown, KS 66002'. The expected plan location 'Public Works HQ, 100 Municipal Way' is also synthetic. The 'Manned' field is a real field from the EPCRA Tier II standard (confirmed in sample data). The 'LocationOfPlans' field is not documented in public EPCRA or CAMEO resources and appears to be a custom field for this environment. The database is stored at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEOfm\cameo_data.mdb on a Windows 11 environment. All facility data and locations are synthetic test data created for this training task.
